title: Acetaminophen Level: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
h Information on Drug-Induced Liver Injury [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases; 2012-. Acetaminophen. [Updated 2016 Jan 28; cited 2024 Feb 23]. [about 12 screens]. Available from: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK548162/
